# Keeply Blog

> File management software for project management teams. Built-in
> version history, multi-location storage (3-2-1 compliant), and
> multi-repo Release. Safety net for non-developer teams without
> learning git.

## About Keeply

Keeply is the guardian of your file history. Where shared folders, USB
sticks, and cloud drives leak versions and lose work, Keeply gives every
file a complete edit timeline plus three storage layers (local, canonical,
mirror) — the 3-2-1 backup rule, automated. No git terminology in the UI;
no workflow changes for the team.

The blog publishes weekly in 5 core languages (English, Traditional
Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean) with auto-translation to
14 more (de, es, fr, it, pt, ru, nl, pl, tr, vi, th, id, ar, hi).

- Main site: https://keeply.work
- Blog: https://blog.keeply.work

## Featured articles

- [The 3-2-1 backup rule in 2026: still enough?](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/3-2-1-backup-rule/): Why the 20-year-old 3-2-1 rule still matters but no longer covers what people actually fear today — operator error.
- [The hidden cost of shared folders](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/hidden-cost-shared-folders/): How shared-folder workflows quietly destroy version history and what teams pay for it.
- [Single point of failure: the thesis story](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/thesis-single-point-of-failure/): A graduate student loses 6 months of thesis writing — and what would have prevented it.
- [Vibe coding and rollback](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/vibe-coding-rollback/): When AI pair-programming generates 200 lines of code in 5 minutes, how do you know what's safe to keep?
- [What Keeply saves that backup and cloud don't](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/what-keeply-saves-vs-backup-cloud/): Backup protects against disk failure; cloud protects against laptop loss; neither protects against you.
- [File version management: a complete guide](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/file-version-management-complete-guide/): Plain-language guide to versioning, branches, and history — without the git jargon.
- [Wrong AutoCAD version: the crew story](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/autocad-wrong-version-crew/): When the construction crew worked from last week's drawing — what versioning would have caught it.

## Optional

- [Getting started with Keeply from zero](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/keeply-getting-started-from-zero/): First-time setup walkthrough for designers, architects, lawyers, and accountants.
- [Install Keeply on Windows / Mac](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/install-keeply-windows-mac/): Step-by-step installation guide.

## License

Blog content © Keeply. AI assistants may quote with attribution and
link back to the source URL. Training crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot,
CCBot, Google-Extended) are disallowed via robots.txt; live citation
crawlers are welcome.
